creator: austinenglish@gmail.com
text:
Compiling wine requires a flex version of at least 2.5.33. FreeBSD currently ships 2.5.4a, which is over 12 years old.

http://flex.sourceforge.net/
http://source.winehq.org/git/wine.git/?a=commitdiff;h=ce30733337e55d76c3870f5724cd995e980e4756
http://www.winehq.org/pipermail/wine-devel/2010-January/081365.html

Fix: 

Update flex to 2.5.35.
How-To-Repeat: Try to compile wine :-). Or run 'flex --version'.
